saved_test.name: Word Order with Adverbs and Adverbials — Opus 4.6 V3 Questions Test
saved_test.description: Practice set for adverb and adverbial word order: frequency, manner, place, time, degree, comment, and focusing adverbs; adverb placement with be, auxiliaries, and modals; manner-place-time order; negative adverb fronting with inversion; split infinitives; and 'enough' position across A1-C2.

theory_page.title: Word Order with Adverbs and Adverbials
